games.explanation: The market has Athletics as a +150 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. Aaron Civale keeps Athletics competitive on the mound against Freddy Peralta. Cold temps suppress the bats.
The market has MIA as a +170 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. Sandy Alcantara keeps MIA competitive on the mound against Tarik Skubal. Wind blowing out — balls are carrying.
The market has WSN as a +185 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. Zack Littell keeps WSN competitive on the mound against Brandon Woodruff.

LAD is the better team by Elo and the sim confirms it — the market isn't giving them enough credit. Roki Sasaki toes the rubber against Jacob deGrom. The sim projects LAD to plate 6.0 runs — expect some fireworks.
The market has CLE as a +165 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. Tanner Bibee keeps CLE competitive on the mound against Chris Sale.
